== Notes for [[Item:Q89611|Q89611]] ==

ID: I84737

Name: Cornelia Marcellina

Given Name: Cornelia

Surname: Marcellina

Sex: F

_UID: 256175B5053387418C0819482F705CCE6EBA

Change Date: 3 Oct 2005

Birth: ABT 205

Death: deceased

Father: Lucius Cornelius Cassonius Scipio b: ABT 170

Marriage 1 M. Pupienus Africanus b: ABT 200

Married:

Children

Pupiena Sextia Paulina Cethegilla b: ABT 225

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I84737

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
